description: A contact details list displaying a staff member's email address and optional telephone number as a definition list.

stories.name: EmailOnly
stories.description: Contact block with email address only

stories.name: EmailAndTelephone
stories.description: Contact block with both email and telephone number

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple contact blocks as typically seen on a staff listing page

notes: Email is always present. Telephone is optional — rendered only when provided. The dt elements use class 'sr-only' (screen-reader only label) and are hardcoded as 'Email' and 'Telephone'. The telephone strong element uses class 'telnum'.
